name: feat-03-file-upload
initialPrompt: We need a proper file upload system. Users currently paste base64 into text fields which is terrible. I want: drag-and-drop upload with progress bar, support for images, PDFs, and spreadsheets up to 50 MB, virus scanning before files are served, thumbnail generation for images, and a file management page where users can view, rename, and delete their uploads. Storage should be S3-compatible.

cannedAuthorResponse.title: File upload system with S3 storage

blocks.text: Replace base64-in-text-field workaround with a first-class file upload system
successCriteria: uploads up to 50 MB succeed reliably
virus-infected files never served to users
images show thumbnails within 10 s of upload

blocks.question: Which S3-compatible storage provider?
blocks.rationale: Zero egress fees; S3-compatible API means no SDK changes later.

blocks.title: Build drag-and-drop upload widget with progress bar
acceptance: file type and size validated client-side before upload

blocks.title: Build upload API endpoint with presigned URLs
Integrate virus scanning before files are marked available
Generate image thumbnails asynchronously post-upload
acceptance: stored in same bucket with -thumb suffix

blocks.description: Virus scan SLA may exceed 30 s for large files, degrading UX
blocks.mitigation: Show 'processing' state; notify via email when file is ready

blocks.question: Should we enforce a per-user storage quota, and if so what is the limit?
